# /review

> Review the spec only. Per [ADR-0001](../../../design/adr/0001-review-scope-spec-only.md), `/review` does NOT score FDD / TDD / blueprint / test-plan — those run their own inline self-checks at generation time. `/review` is the SPEC_APPROVED gate.

## Usage

```
/review [--approve] [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

- Bare `/review` produces a review report against [templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md) without flipping the gate.
- `/review --approve` requires zero BLOCKERs (and acceptances on REQUIREDs) before transitioning `SPEC_APPROVED.status` to APPROVED.

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/spec.md` (must exist and pass `doc_lint`)
- [templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/spec-review.checklist.md)
- `agents.yaml` for d365-ce config
- `.workflow.json` — current state must be `SPEC_DRAFT` for `--approve` to work

## Execution flow

1. Resolve feature; assert spec.md exists.
2. Run `doc_lint` MCP tool against spec.md. Any BLOCKER aborts.
3. For each category in `spec-review.checklist.md`, evaluate the spec; assign severity (BLOCKER / REQUIRED / WARNING / OK).
4. Write `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/reviews/spec-review.md` with findings table + verdict.
5. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `SPEC_REVIEWED`.
6. When `--approve`:
   - Require zero BLOCKERs.
   - Require every REQUIRED to have an acceptance note (`accepted-by`, `accepted-reason` columns).
   - Flip `gates.SPEC_APPROVED.status` to `APPROVED`, fill `ts` + `by`.
   - Append `currentStates += SPEC_APPROVED`; remove `SPEC_DRAFT`/`SPEC_REVIEWED`.
   - Phase advances eligible: parallel `/fdd`, `/test-plan`, `/plan` per [04-workflow-gates.md](../../../design/04-workflow-gates.md).

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/reviews/spec-review.md` (always)
- `.workflow.json` updated (gate flip only on `--approve` with clean BLOCKER list)

## ADR-0001 enforcement

- This command is the **only** review gate command. FDD/TDD/blueprint/test-plan run inline self-check inside `/fdd /tdd /blueprint /test-plan` and emit a `Quality self-check` appendix; BLOCKER findings there fail the write, but those are not gate transitions.
